en.name: Calcudoku
en.desc: A math-based logic puzzle! Fill the grid with numbers that satisfy cage equations. Each row and column must contain unique numbers. Brain training at its finest!
en.description: Calcudoku (also known as KenKen) is the arithmetic puzzle that combines math with logic! Fill a grid with numbers so each row and column contains unique digits. But there's a twist—grouped cells (cages) must produce a target number using a specified operation. Addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division puzzles exercise both your math skills and logical thinking!
en.objectives: Fill the grid with numbers 1-N (where N is the grid size) such that no number repeats in any row or column. Each cage must produce its target number when the operation is applied to its cells. Pure logic with a mathematical twist!
en.howToPlay: Click empty cells and use the number pad or keyboard (1-4) to enter numbers. Each cage shows a target result and operation. Numbers in each cage must produce that result when combined with the operation.

rules.controls: Click on an empty cell, then type a number or click the number pad. Each row and column must contain each number exactly once. Cages with operations must equal their target when the operation is applied.
mechanics: Apply operation to cage cells = target

tips: Look for cages with only one cell - that's the answer!
Use row/column constraints to eliminate possibilities
Start with cages that have forced solutions
Division and subtraction cages have limited options

faq.question: How do cages with multiple cells work?
faq.answer: For addition and multiplication, combine all numbers in the cage. For subtraction, subtract the smaller numbers from the largest. For division, divide the largest by the smallest (may need multiple operations).

faq.question: What about single-cell cages?
faq.answer: Single-cell cages have no operation—they simply show the number that goes in that cell. These are free hints that help you start solving!

faq.question: Does order matter in cages?
faq.answer: For addition and multiplication, no—order doesn't matter. For subtraction and division, you always subtract smaller from larger or divide larger by smaller to get the target.

faq.question: Is Calcudoku the same as KenKen?
faq.answer: Yes! Calcudoku and KenKen are essentially the same puzzle type. KenKen is a trademarked name, while Calcudoku is the generic term. Both follow the same rules and provide the same brain-training benefits.

zh.name: 算数独
zh.desc: 基于数学的逻辑谜题！用满足格子算式的数字填满网格。每行每列必须包含唯一数字。极佳的大脑训练！
zh.description: 算数独（也称为KenKen）是将数学与逻辑结合的算术谜题！用数字填充网格，使每行每列包含唯一的数字。但有一个转折——分组的单元格（笼）必须使用指定的运算产生目标数字。加法、减法、乘法和除法谜题锻炼你的数学技能和逻辑思维！
zh.objectives: 用1-N的数字填充网格（N是网格大小），使任何行或列中没有数字重复。当运算应用于其单元格时，每个笼必须产生其目标数字。纯逻辑带有数学转折！
zh.howToPlay: 点击空格并使用数字键盘或键盘(1-4)输入数字。每个格子显示目标结果和运算符。格子内的数字必须用该运算符产生该结果。

rules.controls: 点击空单元格，然后输入数字或点击数字键盘。每行每列必须恰好包含每个数字一次。带运算的笼在应用运算时必须等于其目标。
mechanics: 将运算应用于笼单元格 = 目标
单单元格笼 = 直接答案
更大的网格 = 更多复杂性
features: 数学+逻辑 - 双重大脑训练
独特解决方案 - 一个正确答案

tips: 寻找只有一个格子 - 那就是答案！
使用行列约束来消除可能性
从有必然解的格子开始
除法和减法格子选项有限

faq.question: 多单元格笼是如何工作的？
faq.answer: 对于加法和乘法，组合笼中的所有数字。对于减法，从最大的减去较小的数字。对于除法，用最大的除以最小的（可能需要多次运算）。

faq.question: 单单元格笼呢？
faq.answer: 单单元格笼没有运算——它们只显示放入该单元格的数字。这些是帮助你开始解决的免费提示！

faq.question: 笼中的顺序重要吗？
faq.answer: 对于加法和乘法，不——顺序不重要。对于减法和除法，你总是从较大的减去较小的或将较大的除以较小的来得到目标。

faq.question: 算数独和KenKen一样吗？
faq.answer: 是的！算数独和KenKen本质上是相同的谜题类型。KenKen是注册商标名称，而算数独是通用术语。两者遵循相同的规则并提供相同的大脑训练好处。
